seedanceSegments.title: Rose milk swirl hook
seedanceSegments.description: Rose powder blush spiral, vanilla streak, milk ribbon payoff.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead prep view. Use @KitchenIslandDefault to preserve terrazzo identity if the shot widens. Use @Whisk only as whisk silhouette. Use @RoseMilkSwirlFrame only as blush milk swirl color and vein topology. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; powder puff, liquid swirl, whisk tick, ribbon slap. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s: rose powder falls into milk and blooms blush spiral; 0.8-1.7s: spiral tightens (payoff to powder); 1.7-2.5s: vanilla bean flecks streak through blush milk; 2.5-3.4s: prep bowl on terrazzo context; 3.4-5.0s: whisk lifts satin blush ribbon. Scale lock: prep bowl 12-14 cm diameter, milk fill 5-6 cm deep, not a giant mixing bowl. Color lock: pale blush pink only, not hot magenta. Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo countertop, same cabinet layout. Global negatives: no ingredient lineup, no baked cake, no slice, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no extra shots.

seedanceSegments.title: Vanilla batter build
seedanceSegments.description: Sandy dry mix, butter cubes, eggs, glossy batter ribbon.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as active island view. Use @StandMixer and @SiliconeSpatula only as equipment silhouettes. Use @CakeBatterRibbonFrame only as glossy ivory ribbon batter texture. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight for mixer-side hands. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 7 seconds, no slow motion, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; dry pulse, butter thuds, shell crack, paddle fold, spatula scrape. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s: sandy dry mix pulse; 0.9-1.8s: butter cubes drop with flour puff; 1.8-2.6s: coarse crumb cut-in; 2.6-3.4s: egg yolk dome on batter; 3.4-4.3s: mixer context on terrazzo; 4.3-5.3s: wet pour turns glossy ribbon; 5.3-7.0s: spatula scrape ribbon fall. Scale lock: mixer bowl 24-26 cm diameter, batter ribbon 2-3 cm thick when lifted, not a bucket pour. Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo, flush black induction edge visible when widened. Global negatives: no overbeat gluey batter, no chocolate color, no baked layers, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Bake layers hard cut
seedanceSegments.description: Pan fill, oven slide, raw-to-baked hard cut, clean toothpick.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @OvenWide for already-open oven context. Use @OvenCloseup for baked layer reveal. Use @KitchenIslandDefault for pan lineup on terrazzo. Use @RawCakeLayerFrame only as pale smooth batter in 15 cm round pan two-thirds full. Use @BakedCakeLayerFrame only as golden domed 15 cm layer with fine velvety edge, not a muffin or loaf. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 8 seconds, no oven door action, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; batter pour, tray slide, oven hum, toothpick pull. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.9s: batter pour into lined pan; 0.9-1.9s: pans on terrazzo; 1.9-2.9s: tray slides into open oven; 2.9-3.7s: raw batter surface; 3.7-4.0s: hard cut; 4.0-6.2s: golden domed baked layer; 6.2-8.0s: clean toothpick pull. Scale lock: each layer 15 cm diameter, 2 cm tall after level (post-bake dome up to 3 cm before trim), four layers total, not a single tall loaf. Negative scale: not cupcake, not sheet cake slab, not miniature. Global negatives: no oven door open/close, no free morph between raw and baked, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Level disks and steam
seedanceSegments.description: Invert steam, dome shave curl, flat stack-ready disks.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandDefault and @KitchenIslandOverhead for cool and level views. Use @LeveledCakeLayerFrame only as flat 15 cm disk 2 cm thick with even golden edge. Use @BakedCakeLayerFrame only for domed pre-level topology in shave beat. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; steam hiss, wire scrape, crumb patter. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s: hot layer inverts with steam; 1.0-2.5s: wire leveler shaves dome, crumb curl falls; 2.5-4.0s: flat disk reveal; 4.0-6.0s: three leveled disks on rack context. Scale lock: 15 cm diameter disks, 2 cm thick after level, four disks total. Global negatives: no collapsed layers, no giant cake diameter, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Rose buttercream whip
seedanceSegments.description: Pale butter to blush satin peaks.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as active view. Use @StandMixer and @Whisk only as equipment silhouettes. Use @RoseButtercreamPeaksFrame only as pale blush satin peaks, pipeable, not greasy split. Generate exactly 2 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; whisk whoosh, peak kiss. Mandatory timing: 0.0-2.5s: pale butter whips to airy white volume; 2.5-5.0s: blush peaks on whisk. Color lock: pale blush pink, not magenta. Global negatives: no split greasy butter, no neon color, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Stack coat slice
seedanceSegments.description: Frosting smear, stack squeeze, crumb to smooth coat, rosette, wedge slice.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandDefault and @KitchenIslandOverhead for stack and pipe views. Use @OffsetSpatula only as offset spatula silhouette. Use @StackedCakePartialFrame only as three-layer partial stack on white stand 15 cm diameter. Use @CakeCrossSectionFrame only for wedge slice geometry: four sponge layers with blush bands. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterLeft for hands. Generate exactly 8 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 10 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; spatula glide, soft cake land, pip squeak, slice pull. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s: first frosting smear; 1.0-1.9s: layer place with filling squeeze; 1.9-2.9s: partial stack context; 2.9-3.8s: speckled crumb coat; 3.8-4.8s: mirror smooth final coat; 4.8-5.7s: rosette pip; 5.7-7.5s: wedge slice reveals cross-section; 7.5-10.0s: stand with wedge removed. Scale lock: 15 cm diameter, four layers, 12-14 cm total height with frosting, white cake stand 18-20 cm plate. Destructive slice allowed here only. Global negatives: no fork dive on hero, no leaning tower, no text, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Final hero lock for outro
seedanceSegments.description: Rosette refresh, rose dust sparkle, motionless intact cake for outro.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as active hero view. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for dust and rosette beats. Use @FinalDishVisual only as intact final cake: four layers, 15 cm diameter, pale blush smooth coat, piped rosette border, on white cake stand, NO wedge missing, NO slice, NO fork in cake. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; soft pip, powder whisper, ambient hush. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s: rosette border refresh pip; 1.0-2.0s: rose powder snow on frosting; 2.0-4.0s: cake completely motionless on stand; 4.0-5.0s: slow push-in, static cake; 5.0-6.0s: wide kitchen context, cake foreground static. Critical: no slice, no missing wedge, no fork lift after 2.0s, dish unchanged. Scale lock: same 15 cm four-layer cake as segment-06 but fully intact. Global negatives: no character touching cake, no food destruction, no text, no music.
